title: Restore Deleted Portfolio
excerpt:
Currently, when deleting a portfolio, it permanently deleted and we can’t restore it. 
We would like to have the option to restore portfolio like any other deleted board for 30 days.

posts.author: naama (Naama Erez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, when deleting a portfolio, it permanently deleted and we can’t restore it.
We would like to have the option to restore portfolio like any other deleted board for 30 days.
